title: ANC - 4.-ANC is ON and its value is either Adaptive or Standard and User doesn’t change value during call when Transparency is OFF without selected values
scenario: ANC remains ON and Transparency Mode is greyed out during a call, with popup informing user it's unavailable, then returns to normal operation after call ends
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
3. Set ANC to ON with either Adaptive or Standard mode selected.
4. Ensure Transparency Mode is OFF with no value selected.
5. Make or receive a call using the connected Poly Bluetooth device.
6. During the call, observe the ANC status in the app or on the device.
7. During the call, tap on Transparency Mode in the Audio Settings screen.
8. Observe the popup or message displayed when tapping Transparency Mode.
10. After the call ends, check the ANC setting in Audio Settings.
11. After the call ends, check the Transparency Mode setting in Audio Settings.
12. Toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally (outside of a call).
expected: 1. ANC remains ON with the previously selected option (Adaptive or Standard) during the call. 2. Transparency Mode is greyed out and inaccessible during the call. 3. Tapping Transparency Mode during the call shows a popup informing the user it's unavailable. 4. After the call ends, ANC stays ON with the selected value. 5. After the call ends, Transparency Mode remains OFF with no value selected. 6. After the call, the user can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally.
